title: CREATE TABLE WITH DATA...
poc: create table t1 as select id from tables order by id asc with data;
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE AS SELECT with data clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders AS SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC WITH DATA;
CREATE TABLE products (product_id INT, price DECIMAL(10, 2), stock INT CHECK (stock >= 0));
